## Summary

Provide a short description of the feature or improvement.

---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve?

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this feature to work.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions?

---

## Benefits

How would this improve Dala Tracker?

- [ ] Better usability
- [ ] Better performance
- [ ] New functionality
- [ ] Quality of life
- [ ] Other

---

## Additional Information

Add mockups, references, screenshots, or any other helpful details.
